title: Beach Bum Beauties - Check Out Anguilla's Finest Beaches
subheadline: Looking for the best beaches to veg out this weekend?
description:
These are some of the best beaches to explore over a lazy weekend
/place/Shoal Bay East A local and tourist favorite! SHoal Bay East is always buzzying with fun , food and unforgettable views.
/place/Little Bay More for the laid back views Little Bay is a chunk of absolutely serenity carved into Anguilla's dramatic rocky cliffside.
